title: 七面钟之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\144-七面钟之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
After Inspector Batter commands her to return to bed, Bondel Brent climbs back up the ivy to her room. Suspecting the Inspector is suspicious of her, she remains awake and creeps into the corridor at 2:00 am. She discovers that the sentry post is empty and Jimmy Sycamore is missing from his post. While observing Terence O'Rourke's room, she sees a doorknob turn slowly and then return to its original position. Seeking Bill Everly, Bondel mistakenly enters Lady Razzi's room instead. Suddenly, a commotion breaks out in the library below, characterized by the sounds of a struggle and two gunshots.

Meanwhile, Loren Wade wakes up at 9:45 pm and prepares to leave her room with a flashlight and an ivory-handled gun. After leaving her dog, Rachel, behind, she drives to the Two-Footed Dragon Church. Upon arriving at the terrace, she finds a brown paper package that has fallen from an open window. As she witnesses a person descending the ivy, she flees, hearing voices arguing behind her. She runs into Detective Bartholomew, who leads her toward the library window.

Inside the library, they find Jimmy Sycamore lying on the windowsill, appearing to be covered in blood. While Loren screams that he is dead, Detective Bartholomew insists that Sycamore is merely unconscious from a head injury and a gunshot wound to the arm. As a crowd gathers outside the locked door, the detective and Loren work together to bandage Sycamore's arm with a handkerchief.
